signin:oauthclientauthentication.description: Filters access by the client authentication method used in the OAuth token request

signin:oauthclientid.description: Filters access by the OAuth client ID used in the authorization or token request

signin:oauthgranttype.description: Filters access by the OAuth grant type used in the token request

signin:oauthredirecturi.description: Filters access by the redirect URI specified in the OAuth authorization request

signin:oauthtokentype.description: Filters access by the type of OAuth token being operated on

signin:principalarn.description: Filters access by the principal ARN during pre-authentication console sign-in
